title: amaranthus cannabinus
intro: Amaranthus cannabinus, also known as cannabinous or cannabis amaranth, is a plant species belonging to the amaranth family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Amaranthus cannabinus include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Amaranthus cannabinus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Foods (Basel, Switzerland)", amaranthus cannabinus has beneficial health-promoting properties and a rich phytochemical composition with wide pharmacological activity.
